creator: scott@sabami.seaslug.org
text:
[no, I don't know how to gauge severity/priority above - relative
	to what?]

	Version 1.0.3 had a few problems (e.g. core dumps on some types of
	multipart messages).  This patch updates the port to nmh-1.0.4.
	It gets rid of a now-integrated patch file, adds a couple Makefile
	knobs to go with some new configure script options.

Fix: Apply patch:
